stocks.impact_theory: Recent news of NVIDIA unveiling the Blackwell Ultra AI chip with 50% performance boost amid surging demand from hyperscalers. Economic implications include accelerated AI infrastructure spend, boosting capex for tech giants. Market psychology: FOMO buying as investors fear missing AI supercycle. Historical parallels: Similar to 2023 Hopper GPU launch which sparked 200% rally. Analogies: 1. Like rocket fuel igniting the AI race engine. 2. Domino effect where one chip upgrade cascades into trillion-dollar data center investments.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal headlines like 'NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra crushes benchmarks'; X semantic search shows 80% positive sentiment with viral posts on performance gains (limit 20, latest mode). High engagement on AI future.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for +10-15% upside in 1-2 weeks on momentum; target $160.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Risky short, potential squeeze -5% loss if breaks high.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Chip supply shortages, US-China trade tensions, overvaluation bubble burst.

stocks.justification: Strong news catalysts, historical precedent, overwhelming positive social sentiment.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla reports Q1 2026 deliveries beat estimates by 15% at 550k units, driven by Cybertruck ramp and FSD v13 approval. Economic: Signals EV adoption acceleration, potential margin expansion. Psychology: Relief rally post-delay fears. Parallels: 2020 delivery beats led to 700% YTD gain. Analogies: 1. Like a slingshot propelling past competitors. 2. Heartbeat revival for EV market after winter slowdown.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News: 'Tesla smashes delivery records' across CNBC, Reuters; X keyword search ($TSLA since:2026-03-30) flooded with bullish memes, analyst upgrades.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +12% to $460 on robotaxi hype.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory hurdles for FSD, competition from BYD, Elon Musk distractions.

stocks.justification: Solid delivery numbers but high valuation tempers enthusiasm; positive but volatile sentiment.

stocks.impact_theory: SMCI secures $10B order from Meta for AI servers using NVIDIA GPUs. Implications: Revenue visibility into FY27, validates liquid cooling tech. Psychology: Small cap proxy to AI boom. Parallels: 2023 AI server frenzy. Analogies: 1. Bridge carrying AI traffic surge. 2. Tsunami wave in server market.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Breaking news on Meta partnership; X posts exploding with #SMCI, high likes/retweets indicating strong sentiment shift.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Order fulfillment delays, dependency on NVDA, accounting concerns.

stocks.justification: Concrete order news with major client, high conviction.

stocks.impact_theory: Apple launches Vision Pro 2 with AI integration, pre-orders exceed 2M units. Implications: AR/VR market entry, services growth. Psychology: Innovation halo reignites growth narrative. Parallels: iPhone launch 2007. Analogies: 1. Gateway to spatial computing era. 2. Phoenix rising from services plateau.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Product launch buzz; mixed X sentiment but positive analyst notes.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Mild short on China sales weakness.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Antitrust lawsuits, slowing iPhone sales, high expectations.

stocks.justification: Promising launch but early stage tech adoption risks.

stocks.impact_theory: Palantir wins $1B DoD contract for AI defense platform. Implications: Government revenue stability, commercial AIP expansion. Psychology: Meme stock revival with real contracts. Parallels: Post-IPO contract wins 2021. Analogies: 1. Digital sword for modern warfare. 2. Oil well gusher for data analytics.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Gov contract announcements; X hype with retail frenzy.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Profitability concerns, competition, retail euphoria fade.
